key.name: active-profile
key.description: Current bundled animation profile.

key.name: debug-logging
key.description: Emit More Tweaks runtime logs into GNOME Shell logs.

key.name: test-mode
key.description: Reserved for predictable animation testing.

key.name: reduced-motion-mode
key.description: Keep the bundled runtime enabled while toning down movement.

key.name: experimental-effects
key.description: Expose higher-risk compiz-like or shader-capable effect families.

key.name: effects-quality
key.description: Controls how aggressively advanced effects should trade performance for spectacle.

key.name: custom-presets-version
key.description: Incremented when custom presets file changes, signaling the extension to reload.

key.name: per-app-overrides
key.description: JSON string containing per-WM_CLASS animation rule overrides.

key.name: system-overview-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for showing and hiding the Activities overview.

key.name: system-show-apps-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for transitioning between the Activities overview and the application grid.

key.name: system-app-grid-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for switching to and from the app grid view.

key.name: system-workspace-switch-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for workspace switching animations.

key.name: system-search-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for search results fade-in and fade-out.

key.name: system-app-folder-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for opening and closing app folders in the app grid.

key.name: system-osd-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for on-screen display popups like volume and brightness.

key.name: window-open-enabled
key.description: Animate normal windows when they open.

key.name: window-open-preset
key.description: Preset used for normal windows opening.

key.name: window-open-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for normal window opening animations.

key.name: window-open-delay-ms
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before normal window opening animations begin.

key.name: window-open-intensity
key.description: Intensity multiplier for normal window opening animations.

key.name: window-close-enabled
key.description: Animate normal windows when they close.

key.name: window-close-preset
key.description: Preset used for normal windows closing.

key.name: window-close-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for normal window closing animations.

key.name: window-close-delay-ms
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before normal window closing animations begin.

key.name: window-close-intensity
key.description: Intensity multiplier for normal window closing animations.

key.name: window-minimize-enabled
key.description: Animate normal windows when they minimize.

key.name: window-minimize-preset
key.description: Preset used for normal windows minimizing.

key.name: window-minimize-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for normal window minimizing animations.

key.name: window-minimize-delay-ms
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before normal window minimizing animations begin.

key.name: window-minimize-intensity
key.description: Intensity multiplier for normal window minimizing animations.

key.name: window-unminimize-enabled
key.description: Animate normal windows when they are restored.

key.name: window-unminimize-preset
key.description: Preset used for normal windows restoring.

key.name: window-unminimize-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for normal window restore animations.

key.name: window-unminimize-delay-ms
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before normal window restore animations begin.

key.name: window-unminimize-intensity
key.description: Intensity multiplier for normal window restore animations.

key.name: window-focus-enabled
key.description: Animate normal windows when they receive focus.

key.name: window-focus-preset
key.description: Preset used for normal window focus changes.

key.name: window-focus-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for normal window focus animations.

key.name: window-focus-delay-ms
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before normal window focus animations begin.

key.name: window-focus-intensity
key.description: Intensity multiplier for normal window focus animations.

key.name: window-defocus-enabled
key.description: Animate normal windows when they lose focus.

key.name: window-defocus-preset
key.description: Preset used for normal window defocus changes.

key.name: window-defocus-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for normal window defocus animations.

key.name: window-defocus-delay-ms
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before normal window defocus animations begin.

key.name: window-defocus-intensity
key.description: Intensity multiplier for normal window defocus animations.

key.name: window-maximize-enabled
key.description: Animate normal windows when they maximize.

key.name: window-maximize-preset
key.description: Preset used for normal windows maximizing.

key.name: window-maximize-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for normal window maximize animations.

key.name: window-maximize-delay-ms
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before normal window maximize animations begin.

key.name: window-maximize-intensity
key.description: Intensity multiplier for normal window maximize animations.

key.name: window-unmaximize-enabled
key.description: Animate normal windows when they leave a maximized state.

key.name: window-unmaximize-preset
key.description: Preset used for normal windows unmaximizing.

key.name: window-unmaximize-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for normal window unmaximize animations.

key.name: window-unmaximize-delay-ms
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before normal window unmaximize animations begin.

key.name: window-unmaximize-intensity
key.description: Intensity multiplier for normal window unmaximize animations.

key.name: window-move-start-enabled
key.description: Animate normal windows when dragging begins.

key.name: window-move-start-preset
key.description: Preset used for drag-start window motion.

key.name: window-move-start-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for window move start animations.

key.name: window-move-start-delay-ms
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before window move start animations begin.

key.name: window-move-start-intensity
key.description: Intensity multiplier for window move start animations.

key.name: window-move-stop-enabled
key.description: Animate normal windows when dragging ends.

key.name: window-move-stop-preset
key.description: Preset used for drag-end window motion.

key.name: window-move-stop-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for window move stop animations.

key.name: window-move-stop-delay-ms
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before window move stop animations begin.

key.name: window-move-stop-intensity
key.description: Intensity multiplier for window move stop animations.

key.name: window-resize-start-enabled
key.description: Animate normal windows when resizing begins.

key.name: window-resize-start-preset
key.description: Preset used for resize-start window motion.

key.name: window-resize-start-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for window resize start animations.

key.name: window-resize-start-delay-ms
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before window resize start animations begin.

key.name: window-resize-start-intensity
key.description: Intensity multiplier for window resize start animations.

key.name: window-resize-stop-enabled
key.description: Animate normal windows when resizing ends.

key.name: window-resize-stop-preset
key.description: Preset used for resize-end window motion.

key.name: window-resize-stop-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for window resize stop animations.

key.name: window-resize-stop-delay-ms
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before window resize stop animations begin.

key.name: window-resize-stop-intensity
key.description: Intensity multiplier for window resize stop animations.

key.name: dialog-open-enabled
key.description: Animate dialog windows when they open.

key.name: dialog-open-preset
key.description: Preset used for dialog windows opening.

key.name: dialog-open-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for dialog opening animations.

key.name: dialog-open-delay-ms
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before dialog opening animations begin.

key.name: dialog-open-intensity
key.description: Intensity multiplier for dialog opening animations.

key.name: dialog-close-enabled
key.description: Animate dialog windows when they close.

key.name: dialog-close-preset
key.description: Preset used for dialog windows closing.

key.name: dialog-close-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for dialog closing animations.

key.name: dialog-close-delay-ms
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before dialog closing animations begin.

key.name: dialog-close-intensity
key.description: Intensity multiplier for dialog closing animations.

key.name: dialog-focus-enabled
key.description: Animate dialog windows when they receive focus.

key.name: dialog-focus-preset
key.description: Preset used for dialog focus changes.

key.name: dialog-focus-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for dialog focus animations.

key.name: dialog-focus-delay-ms
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before dialog focus animations begin.

key.name: dialog-focus-intensity
key.description: Intensity multiplier for dialog focus animations.

key.name: dialog-defocus-enabled
key.description: Animate dialog windows when they lose focus.

key.name: dialog-defocus-preset
key.description: Preset used for dialog defocus changes.

key.name: dialog-defocus-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for dialog defocus animations.

key.name: dialog-defocus-delay-ms
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before dialog defocus animations begin.

key.name: dialog-defocus-intensity
key.description: Intensity multiplier for dialog defocus animations.

key.name: modaldialog-open-enabled
key.description: Animate modal dialogs when they open.

key.name: modaldialog-open-preset
key.description: Preset used for modal dialogs opening.

key.name: modaldialog-open-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for modal dialog opening animations.

key.name: modaldialog-open-delay-ms
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before modal dialog opening animations begin.

key.name: modaldialog-open-intensity
key.description: Intensity multiplier for modal dialog opening animations.

key.name: modaldialog-close-enabled
key.description: Animate modal dialogs when they close.

key.name: modaldialog-close-preset
key.description: Preset used for modal dialog closing.

key.name: modaldialog-close-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for modal dialog closing animations.

key.name: modaldialog-close-delay-ms
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before modal dialog closing animations begin.

key.name: modaldialog-close-intensity
key.description: Intensity multiplier for modal dialog closing animations.

key.name: modaldialog-focus-enabled
key.description: Animate modal dialogs when they receive focus.

key.name: modaldialog-focus-preset
key.description: Preset used for modal dialog focus changes.

key.name: modaldialog-focus-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for modal dialog focus animations.

key.name: modaldialog-focus-delay-ms
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before modal dialog focus animations begin.

key.name: modaldialog-focus-intensity
key.description: Intensity multiplier for modal dialog focus animations.

key.name: modaldialog-defocus-enabled
key.description: Animate modal dialogs when they lose focus.

key.name: modaldialog-defocus-preset
key.description: Preset used for modal dialog defocus changes.

key.name: modaldialog-defocus-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for modal dialog defocus animations.

key.name: modaldialog-defocus-delay-ms
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before modal dialog defocus animations begin.

key.name: modaldialog-defocus-intensity
key.description: Intensity multiplier for modal dialog defocus animations.

key.name: notification-open-enabled
key.description: Animate notification banners when they open.

key.name: notification-open-preset
key.description: Preset used for notification banners opening.

key.name: notification-open-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for notification opening animations.

key.name: notification-open-delay-ms
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before notification opening animations begin.

key.name: notification-open-intensity
key.description: Intensity multiplier for notification opening animations.

key.name: notification-close-enabled
key.description: Animate notification banners when they close.

key.name: notification-close-preset
key.description: Preset used for notification banners closing.

key.name: notification-close-duration-ms
key.description: Duration in milliseconds for notification closing animations.

key.name: notification-close-delay-ms
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before notification closing animations begin.

key.name: notification-close-intensity
key.description: Intensity multiplier for notification closing animations.

key.name: gesture-overrides-enabled
key.description: Master switch for custom three-finger and four-finger swipe behaviour.

key.name: gesture-3f-swipe-up
key.description: Action for a three-finger upward swipe.

key.name: gesture-3f-swipe-down
key.description: Action for a three-finger downward swipe.

key.name: gesture-3f-swipe-left
key.description: Action for a three-finger leftward swipe. No default GNOME binding.

key.name: gesture-3f-swipe-right
key.description: Action for a three-finger rightward swipe. No default GNOME binding.

key.name: gesture-4f-swipe-up
key.description: Action for a four-finger upward swipe. No default GNOME binding.

key.name: gesture-4f-swipe-down
key.description: Action for a four-finger downward swipe. No default GNOME binding.

key.name: gesture-4f-swipe-left
key.description: Action for a four-finger leftward swipe.

key.name: gesture-4f-swipe-right
key.description: Action for a four-finger rightward swipe.

key.name: tile-cols
key.description: Number of columns in the tiling grid (1–5).

key.name: tile-rows
key.description: Number of rows in the tiling grid (1–5).

key.name: tile-preview-enabled
key.description: Show a preview overlay and snap windows when dragging near screen edges.

key.name: tile-preview-distance
key.description: Pixels from screen edge to trigger the tile preview (0–150).

key.name: tile-preview-delay
key.description: Delay in milliseconds before the tile preview appears (25–1000).

key.name: tile-gaps-enabled
key.description: Master switch for adding pixel gaps between tiled windows and screen edges.

key.name: tile-gap-inner
key.description: Pixel gap between adjacent tiled windows (0–64).

key.name: tile-gap-outer
key.description: Pixel gap between tiled windows and screen edges (0–64).

key.name: topbar-overrides-enabled
key.description: Master switch for custom top bar appearance tweaks (activities button, clock format, spacing).

key.name: activities-button-visible
key.description: Show or hide the Activities button in the top bar.

key.name: clock-custom-format-enabled
key.description: Use a custom GLib format string for the top bar clock instead of the built-in format.

key.name: clock-custom-format
key.description: A GLib date/time format string for the top bar clock. Only applied when custom clock format is enabled. Common tokens: %H (24h hour), %I (12h hour), %M (minute), %S (second), %a (weekday), %b (month), %e (day), %p (AM/PM).

key.name: panel-icon-spacing
key.description: Horizontal padding in pixels applied to each top bar indicator. -1 means use the default theme spacing.

key.name: panel-icon-color
key.description: Hex color for top bar icons (#rrggbb). Empty string uses default theme color.

key.name: panel-color-symbolic
key.description: Apply the icon color override to symbolic (theme) icons and text labels on the top bar.

key.name: panel-color-other
key.description: Apply the icon color override to non-symbolic (third-party) icons on the top bar using a GPU tint effect.

key.name: panel-layout
key.description: JSON mapping panel items to zones and positions. Format: {"left":["activities"],"center":["dateMenu"],"right":["a11y","keyboard","quickSettings"]}. Empty string means default GNOME layout.

key.name: panel-items-available
key.description: JSON object written by the shell extension listing the actual items in the GNOME Shell panel. Format: {"left":["activities"],"center":["dateMenu"],"right":["a11y","keyboard","quickSettings"]}. Empty string means the extension has not reported yet.

key.name: detected-shell-version
key.description: Major GNOME Shell version detected at extension enable time. Written by the extension, read by the Python UI. Empty string means the extension has not reported yet.

key.name: active-capabilities
key.description: JSON object written by the extension listing which feature managers initialized successfully. Empty string means the extension has not reported yet.
